# Prantor Silage (প্রান্তর সাইলেজ)

> Prantor Silage is a corn (maize) silage brand for cattle farmers in Bangladesh, produced by A.K. Heritage & Corporation in Palashbari, Rangpur. Tagline: "অবিরাম পুষ্টি, অফুরন্ত যোগান" (Endless nutrition, abundant supply).

## Product
- Corn silage made from whole maize plants harvested at milking stage (peak nutrition), fermented with the grain, packed airtight in 50 kg food-grade bags.
- Nutrition (% dry matter basis): dry matter 30–35%, crude protein 8–12%, crude fibre 35–50%, moisture 65–70%, crude fat 2–3%, TDN 65–75%, ash 3–5%.
- For use as animal feed only. Available all year round.

## How to recognize good silage
1. Loose and crumbly, never clumped. 2. Sweet-sour aroma (sign of proper fermentation). 3. Cattle finish it completely with no waste. Prantor Silage meets all three.

## Availability
- Nationwide across Bangladesh: Dhaka, Chattogram, Rajshahi, Khulna, Sylhet, Rangpur, Mymensingh, Barishal divisions. Courier delivery available.

## Ordering & contact
- Hotline: +880 1901-244248 (orders processed same day)
- Manufacturer: A.K. Heritage & Corporation, Palashbari, Rangpur, Bangladesh
- Website: https://www.prantorsilage.com (Bangla primary, English toggle available)

## Related
- Sister brand: AK Silage — https://www.aksilage.com
